visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene starts with a static close-up shot of a colorful promotional sign on a store shelf advertising mochi rolls. The lighting is bright and industrial. (2) A handheld camera zooms in as a hand reaches into a refrigerated display case to grab a plastic-wrapped package of white mochi rolls. (3) The camera cuts to an indoor living room where a woman with long dark hair, wearing a black vest and white blouse, introduces the product while holding a knife. (4) A top-down close-up shot shows hands slicing through the soft, powdery white mochi rolls on a gray cutting mat, revealing green and red fillings. (5) The shot changes to two women sitting on a brown leather couch; they hold a floral plate with the sliced mochi and talk expressively with wide smiles and hand gestures. (6) Close-up shots of the mochi pieces being picked up with fingers, showing the stretchy texture of the outer skin. (7) Back to the two women on the couch as they continue their review, laughing and pointing at the food while the background shows a cozy home environment with warm lighting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 大福捲. [Slogan]: 三種經典口味99元. (2) [Logo]: @cocowine. (3) [Subtitle]: 唐吉訶德的大福捲99塊錢有三條. (4) [Subtitle]: 裡面有抹茶紅豆跟牛奶. (5) [Subtitle]: 哇這厚厚的麻糬皮看起來像棉被好可愛哦. (6) [Subtitle]: 紅豆泥吃得到一顆顆的紅豆. (7) [Subtitle]: 抹茶的味道呢比較接近綠茶然後偏甜. (8) [Subtitle]: 牛奶風味超神奇吃得到草莓的香氣. (9) [Variety]: 完全沒有關係. (10) [Variety]: 有福啦!. (11) [Variety]: 更好的選擇. (12) [Variety]: 想不到吧. (13) [Subtitle]: 其實也不會到很難吃啊. (14) [Variety]: 外皮好吃!

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair wearing a black vest over a white blouse; the second woman has short black hair with bangs, wearing a textured cream-colored sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial shots are in a retail grocery store (Don Don Donki) with shelves and refrigerated cases. The subsequent shots are in a well-lit indoor living room with a brown leather sofa, pillows, and home decor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female voice begins narrating over an upbeat, synthetic electronic BGM with a steady 4/4 beat. (2) A distinct rustling sound of plastic packaging being opened is heard clearly above the music. (3) Rhythmic percussive sounds occur as a knife hits a cutting surface, followed by a light 'pop' sound effect. (4) Two female voices engage in a rapid, overlapping conversation with high pitch and excitement, punctuated by several cartoon 'ding' and 'bubble' sound effects. (5) The BGM continues consistently as the voices describe flavor profiles, with occasional pauses for emphasis where a 'sparkle' SFX is heard.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a casual and entertaining review of a specific dessert product (Mochi rolls) from Don Don Donki, assessing its value and taste.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators are reviewing a product they purchased themselves, showing the price tag and store brand.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical short-form social media editing styles, including vibrant text overlays and sound effects to maintain high engagement.
